name: Zoho Analytics API
what_it_does: Zoho Analytics REST API for self-service BI and data analytics platform. Enables AI agents to import data into workspaces, query reports and dashboards, retrieve analytics data, export visualizations, and integrate Zoho Analytics into data pipeline and reporting workflows. Zoho Analytics is part of the Zoho ecosystem with native integration to Zoho CRM and other Zoho products.
use_cases: Importing data into Zoho Analytics workspaces from ETL and data pipeline agents
Querying reports and dashboards from analytics distribution agents
Exporting analytics data for downstream processing by data integration agents
Integrating Zoho Analytics reports into business intelligence workflow agents
not_for: Enterprise-scale data warehousing (Zoho Analytics targets SMB/mid-market)
best_when: An organization using Zoho Analytics wants AI agents to import data, query reports, and distribute analytics insights across business workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Analytics data may contain business-sensitive metrics and customer data. Ensure appropriate access controls on reporting workspaces.

auth.notes: Zoho Analytics uses Zoho OAuth 2.0. Scopes include ZohoAnalytics.data.read, ZohoAnalytics.data.create, etc. Access tokens expire in 1 hour with refresh token rotation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: 2 users, 10,000 rows of data
pricing.paid_tiers: Basic, Standard, Premium, and Enterprise plans scaling users and rows
pricing.notes: Competitive SMB BI pricing. Part of Zoho ecosystem. API access included on paid plans.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API integration required
OAuth tokens expire in 1 hour — refresh token rotation needed
Workspace ID and view ID required on all data API calls
Zoho Analytics API has two versions (v1 for data import, v2 for metadata) — use both
Large data imports should use bulk import endpoints, not row-by-row API calls
Report queries return data in Zoho-specific format requiring parsing
agent_readiness.security_notes: Business analytics and reporting data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 with scopes. Multi-region data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Business analytics data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 with granular scopes. Multi-region.
